ddls:
CREATE TABLE "nodes" (
  "node_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each node */,
  "network_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the network the node belongs to */,
  "node_name" TEXT /* Unique name for each node */,
  "node_type" TEXT /* Type of node (e.g., router, switch, server) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical or logical location of the node */,
  "status" TEXT /* Operational status of the node (e.g., active, maintenance, offline) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the node was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the node was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("node_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nodes_network_id FOREIGN KEY ("network_id") REFERENCES networks ("network_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "networks" (
  "network_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each network */,
  "network_name" TEXT /* Name of the network */,
  "network_type" TEXT /* Type of network (e.g., WAN, LAN) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the network */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the network was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the network was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("network_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "node_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the node the metric belongs to */,
  "hopcount" INTEGER /* Number of hops to the node */,
  "latency" REAL /* Latency of the node */,
  "power" REAL /* Power consumption of the node */,
  "deployment_penalty" INTEGER /* Deployment penalty of the node */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was recorded */,
  "availability" REAL /* Availability percentage of the node */,
  "jitter" REAL /* Variation in latency over time */,
  "packet_loss" REAL /* Percentage of packets lost during transmission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("node_id") REFERENCES nodes ("node_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "costs" (
  "cost_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cost entry */,
  "node_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the node the cost belongs to */,
  "cost" INTEGER /* Cost associated with the node */,
  "cost_type" TEXT /* Type of cost (e.g., initial, maintenance, operational) */,
  "cost_date" TEXT /* Date when the cost was incurred */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the cost is denominated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cost_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_costs_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("node_id") REFERENCES nodes ("node_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "edges" (
  "edge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each edge */,
  "source_node_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the source node of the edge */,
  "target_node_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the target node of the edge */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the edge (representing the distance or cost between nodes) */,
  "bandwidth" REAL /* Bandwidth of the connection */,
  "status" TEXT /* Operational status of the edge (e.g., active, maintenance, offline) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp when the edge was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("edge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_edges_target_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("target_node_id") REFERENCES nodes ("node_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_edges_source_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_node_id") REFERENCES nodes ("node_id")
)
